name: Blueberry Orange Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9x5-inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Beat butter and sugar until light and fluffy in another large bowl.
5. Add eggs, milk, orange juice, and grated orange peel to the butter mixture. Mix until well combined.
6. Gradually stir in the dry ingredients until just blended.
7. Fold in blueberries and walnuts.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from oven and let cool completely before slicing.
11. Wrap cooled bread tightly in aluminum foil and store it overnight in the refrigerator.
